_notes: OWNER INPUT REQUIRED before go-live. These numbers are NOT in src/data/content.js.
1) 'stock' = how many of each item you physically own. Values below are PLACEHOLDERS — replace with real counts.

2) 'packageBom' = exactly what each package consumes. TABLE SIZE IS AMBIGUOUS: the package 'includes' just says '9 Tables'/'6 Tables'. We defaulted to table8 (8ft). If a package actually uses 6ft tables, change productSlug to 'table6'.
3) 'stripeTaxCodes.default' = the Stripe Tax product tax code applied to all items (set after enabling Stripe Tax). 'txcd_99999999' is the general-tangible-goods fallback.
Slugs must match the item ids in src/data/content.js: baja-splash-18ft, tent20x30, tent20x20, table8, table6, chair.
